name: example.decision_audit
description: Reference plugin that declares decision graph audit metadata capabilities.

capabilities.name: decision.audit
capabilities.description: Read decision graph metadata for external observability adapters.

permissions.name: trace.read
permissions.reason: Required to read execution trace decision metadata.

permissions.name: metrics.read
permissions.reason: Required to expose deterministic decision audit metrics.

permissions.name: event.read
permissions.reason: Required to correlate runtime events with decision graph records.
